description: TypeRig Core API Reference - Font engineering framework for Python
note: This file describes the actual API of the TypeRig Core module. It provides geometric primitives, interpolation, delta scaling, and transformation tools for font engineering.

imports.main: from typerig.core.objects import Node, Contour, Shape, Layer, Glyph, Anchor

Glyph.description: Main glyph object containing layers, contours, nodes, and anchors. Inherits from Container and XMLSerializable.

properties.name: str - Glyph name
properties.mark: str - Mark color as hex string or None
properties.is_compatible: bool - True if all layers are structurally compatible

methods.layer(layer_name=None): Get layer by name. Returns Layer or None.
methods.shapes(layer_name=None): Get shapes list from named layer.
methods.contours(layer_name=None): Get contours list from named layer.
methods.nodes(layer_name=None): Get all nodes from named layer.
methods.anchors(layer_name=None): Get all anchors from named layer.
methods.selected_nodes(layer_name=None): Get selected nodes from named layer.
methods.set_mark(value): Set glyph mark color. Accepts hex '#FF3B30', color name 'Red', or hue int.
methods.build_delta(layer_names_list, attrib): Build DeltaScale for specific attribute across layers. Requires layers have stems set.
methods.create_virtual_axis(layer_names, attribu: Create interpolation axis dict. Defaults to ['point_array', 'metric_array']. Returns dict of DeltaScale objects.
methods.build_contour_deltas(layer_names): Build per-contour DeltaScale objects for angle-dependent scaling.

Layer.description: Layer within a glyph containing shapes, contours, nodes, and anchors. Core unit for interpolation.

properties.name: str - Layer name
properties.contours: list - All contours from all shapes
properties.nodes: list - All nodes from all contours
properties.stems: tuple - (stx, sty) or None if not set
properties.has_stems: bool - True if stems are defined
properties.bounds: Bounds - Bounding box of all contours
properties.signature: int - Hash of node types for compatibility check
properties.align_matrix: dict - Comprehensive alignment positions including metrics and outline positions
properties.sdf: SignedDistanceField - Cached SDF (None until compute_sdf called)

methods.clone(): Create a copy of the layer.
methods.is_compatible(other): Check if layer structure matches other layer.
methods.set_weight(wx, wy): Set x/y weights (stems) for all nodes.
methods.align_to(entity, mode, align): Align layer to another entity using TransformOrigin.
methods.apply_transform(): Apply stored transform to all nodes and anchors.
methods.find_anchor(name): Find anchor by name. Returns Anchor or None.
methods.add_anchor(name, position, align, tolera: Add new anchor with optional alignment.
methods.remove_anchor(name): Remove anchor by name. Returns Anchor or None.
methods.outline_centers(tolerance=5): Compute X centers at min/max Y for mark positioning.
methods.lerp_function(other): Return linear interpolation function: func(tx, ty) -> Layer.
methods.delta_function(other): Return adaptive scaling function: func(scale, time, translate, angle, compensate) -> Layer.
methods.scale_with_axis(virtual_axis, target_wid: Non-destructive scaling to target dimensions using DeltaScale.
methods.analyze_contours(): Return list of (contour_index, angle_radians, angle_degrees) for each contour.
methods.delta_scale_compensated(contour_deltas,: Per-contour delta scaling with diagonal compensation. Returns new Layer.
methods.clear_sdf(): Clear cached SDF to free memory.
methods.to_directional(): Export as Adobe-style directional representation [[DirectionalNode per contour per shape]].
methods.directional_lerp_function(other): Angular interpolation function. func(t, t_angle=None) -> Layer.

Shape.description: Collection of contours forming a filled region. Container for Contour objects.

properties.nodes: list - All nodes from all contours
properties.bounds: Bounds - Bounding box of all contours
properties.sdf: SignedDistanceField - Cached SDF (None until compute_sdf called)

methods.sort(direction=0, mode='BL'): Sort contours by bounding box position.
methods.set_weight(wx, wy): Set x/y weights for all nodes.
methods.offset_outline(distance, curvature_corre: Offset all contours. Returns new Shape.
methods.offset_outline_sdf(distance, sdf=None, c: Offset with SDF distance clamping. Returns new Shape.
methods.delta_scale_compensated(contour_deltas,: Per-contour delta scaling. Returns new Shape.

Contour.description: A single closed or open path composed of nodes. Supports cubic Bezier, quadratic (TT), and line segments.

constructor_kwargs.name: str - Contour name (default: '')
constructor_kwargs.closed: bool - Whether contour is closed (default: False)

properties.segments: list - Line/CubicBezier/QuadraticBezier objects for each segment
properties.node_segments: list - Lists of nodes per segment
properties.point_segments: list - Lists of Points per segment
properties.on_curve_points: list - On-curve Points for each segment
properties.all_points_flat: list - Flat coordinates for polyline rendering
properties.has_quadratic: bool - True if contains TT quadratic segments
properties.is_mixed: bool - True if contains both cubic and quadratic

methods.set_start(index): Rotate contour to start at given node index.
methods.set_weight(wx, wy): Set x/y weights for all nodes.
methods.sample(steps_per_segment=64): Sample contour into polyline of (x,y) tuples.
methods.offset_outline(distance, curvature_corre: Offset using analytical normals. Returns new Contour.
methods.offset_outline_sdf(distance, sdf, clamp_: Offset with SDF clamping. Returns new Contour.
methods.delta_scale_compensated(delta, stems, sc: Delta scaling with compensation. Returns new Contour.
methods.to_cubic_contour(): Convert TT quadratic to PS cubic. Returns new Contour.
methods.to_quadratic_contour(max_err=1.0): Convert cubic to TT quadratic using fontTools.
methods.to_directional(): Export as list of DirectionalNode entries.

Node.description: Single point on a contour. Can be on-curve, off-curve (BCP), or curve type.
Node.constructor: Node(x, y, type='on', smooth=False, **kwargs) or Node(point) or Node((x,y))

properties.index: int - Index in parent contour (alias: idx)
properties.clockwise: bool - True if contour turns clockwise at this node
properties.angle_to_next: float - Angle to next node in radians
properties.angle_to_prev: float - Angle to previous node in radians
properties.angle_poly_turn: float - Angle turned by polyline at this node

methods.clone(): Create a copy of the node.
methods.align_to(entity, align, smart): Align to node, Point, or Line.
methods.insert_after(time): Insert node at t (0-1) along current segment.
methods.insert_after_distance(distance): Insert node at given distance along segment.
methods.insert_before_distance(distance): Insert node at distance before current node.
methods.curve_to(self_bcp, other_bcp, other): Draw cubic curve to other node.
methods.from_VFJ(cls, string): Classmethod: create from VarFly Journal format string.
methods.from_object(cls, other, **kwargs): Classmethod: clone from Node or Point.

Knot.description: Node variant for Hobby spline paths. Includes tension, angle, and control point properties.

methods.handle_out: DirectionalHandle - Outgoing handle (angle, magnitude) or None
methods.handle_out_angle: float - Outgoing handle angle in radians
methods.handle_in_angle: float - Incoming handle angle in radians
methods.is_smooth_directional: bool - True if handles are collinear

Anchor.description: Position marker for mark attachment, component placement, and cursive connection.
Anchor.constructor: Anchor(x, y, name='', **kwargs) or Anchor((x,y)), Anchor(point), Anchor(anchor)

constructor_kwargs.name: str - Anchor name (default: '')
constructor_kwargs.color: str - Anchor color as hex (default: None)

Transform.description: 2D affine transformation matrix supporting translate, scale, rotate, skew operations.
Transform.constructor: Transform(xx=1.0, xy=0.0, yx=0.0, yy=1.0, dx=0.0, dy=0.0) or Transform(other)

properties.matrix_values: Access via index [0-5] returns xx, xy, yx, yy, dx, dy

methods.rotate(angle): Rotate by angle in degrees. Returns new Transform.
methods.skew(ax, ay): Skew by angles in degrees. Returns new Transform.
methods.transform(other): Compose with other transform. Returns new Transform.
methods.inverse(): Get inverse transform. Returns new Transform.

TransformOrigin.description: Enum for transformation origin points. Supports bounding box, metrics, outline, and statistical origins.

properties.caption: str - Title case (e.g., 'Bottom Left')
properties.is_bounds: bool - True if resolvable by Bounds.align_matrix
properties.is_metrics: bool - True if requires metrics (advance width)
properties.is_outline: bool - True if requires outline analysis
properties.is_statistical: bool - True if requires centroid computation

Point.description: 2D point with vector math operations and angle/magnitude properties.
Point.constructor: Point(x=0, y=0) or Point(point) or Point((x,y))

operators.+: Addition (Point + Point, Point + float, Point + tuple)
operators.*: Multiplication (Point * scalar, Point * Point = complex product, Point * tuple = component)
operators./: Division (Point / scalar, Point / Point = complex division, Point / tuple)

properties.y_intercept: float - Y intercept of line through origin

methods.solve_width(y): Find X at given Y on line through origin.
methods.angle_to(other, add): Angle to other point in radians.

DeltaScale.description: Delta Machine for interpolation/extrapolation between multiple master layers. Built from point arrays and stem values.

constructor_args.points: list of point arrays (same length each)
constructor_args.stems: list of stem tuples corresponding to each point array

methods.scale_by_time(time, scale_or_dimension,: Scale by interpolation time. Returns iterator of (x,y) tuples.
methods.scale_by_stem(stem, scale_or_dimension,: Scale by stem width. Returns iterator of (x,y) tuples.

DeltaArray.description: Simple delta interpolation array for linear interpolation between multiple point arrays.

methods.mixer(global_time): Get coordinate arrays at time. Returns (PointArray, PointArray).
methods.timer(global_time, extrapolate): Get index and fraction for time.

Bounds.description: Bounding box with alignment matrix for positioning.

properties.align_matrix: dict - Positions keyed by TransformOrigin code

SignedDistanceField.description: Signed distance field for outline-based operations like offset clamping.

methods.query(x, y): Query distance at point. Positive=outside, negative=inside.
methods.is_computed: bool - True if SDF has been computed

DirectionalNode.description: Named tuple for Adobe-style directional contour representation.
DirectionalNode.note: Each on-curve node owns its outgoing/incoming handle positions as (angle, magnitude) vectors.

DirectionalHandle.description: Named tuple for directional handle representation.
DirectionalHandle.note: Angle in radians (standard math, CCW from +X). Magnitude in font units.

interpolation.slerp_angle(a0, a1, t): Spherical linear interpolation for angles (short arc).

geometry.two_point_circle(p1, p2): Circle from diameter endpoints. Returns (center, radius).
geometry.three_point_circle(p1, p2, p3): Circle from three points. Returns (center, radius).
geometry.two_point_square(p1, p2): Square from diagonal. Returns 4 corner tuples.

hobby_spline.hobby_control_points(z0, z1, theta, phi,: Compute Bezier control points using Hobby algorithm.

compensation.timer(target, start, end, fix_boundary): Compute interpolation time from stem width.

usage_examples.create_glyph_with_layers: layer1 = Layer(name='Light'); layer2 = Layer(name='Bold'); glyph = Glyph([layer1, layer2], name='A')
usage_examples.iterate_glyph_nodes: for node in glyph.nodes('LayerName'): print(node.x, node.y)
usage_examples.node_construction: node = Node(100, 200); node = Node((100, 200)); node = Node(point)
usage_examples.delta_interpolation: layer1.stems = (80, 80); layer2.stems = (120, 120); axis = glyph.create_virtual_axis(['Light', 'Bold']); scaled = glyph.layer('Light').scale_with_axis(axis, target_width=600)
usage_examples.transform_usage: t = Transform(); t.scale(1.5, 1.5); t.rotate(90); node.x, node.y = t.applyTransformation(node.x, node.y)
usage_examples.point_math: p = Point(100, 200); p2 = p + Point(10, 20); dist = abs(p2 - p)

xml_serialization.note: All major objects inherit from XMLSerializable and support to_XML() and from_XML() methods.
xml_serialization.export: object.to_XML() -> str - Returns XML string representation

compatibility_notes: All contour/layer/shape operations require compatible structure (same number of nodes per contour).
Delta operations require stems to be set on layers (layer.stems = (stx, sty)).
Directional methods require cubic (PostScript) contours. Use to_cubic_contour() for TT contours.
SDF operations require fontTools library for cubic-to-quadratic conversion.
Node triad properties require parent contour to be set (orphan nodes raise AssertionError).
